## Type of Testing Work

- [ ] Unit test (new tests for existing code)
- [ ] Integration test (test interactions between modules)
- [ ] E2E test (end-to-end workflow test)
- [ ] Test coverage improvement (increase % coverage)
- [ ] Test refactoring (improve test code quality)
- [ ] Test infrastructure (setup, fixtures, helpers)

## Test Strategy

Scenarios to cover:
- [ ] Happy path (normal usage)
- [ ] Edge cases (boundary conditions)
- [ ] Error cases (exceptions, validation)
- [ ] Performance (latency, throughput)
- [ ] Security (if applicable)

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] All tests written and passing
- [ ] Coverage target met ([X]%)
- [ ] Tests are readable and maintainable
- [ ] Test data/fixtures documented
- [ ] Tests integrated into CI/CD
- [ ] No flaky tests
